title: Gray’s Veins: Customizable Ore Visuals
description: This mod adds customizable ore visuals meant to help with mining, such as adding Outlines, Glowing, and Animation!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5898da1337a49abfe11cb4f462712ec6b3d700e5.png)

# Gray’s Veins: Customizable Ore Visuals

**Gray’s Veins** is a client-side Fabric mod that lets you customize ore visibility textures using outlines, animation, glow, and per-ore controls.

Instead of forcing one ore style on everything, Gray’s Veins lets you choose how visible each ore should be. Use one global setup for all supported ores, or switch to custom mode and tune each ore individually.

![preview/screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7498b225c4fbd716106105bdabe5a163f18a515.png)

## Features

- Toggleable ore outlines
- Toggleable animated ore textures
- Toggleable glow/emissive-style textures
- Glow strength slider
- Global **All** mode for quick setup
- **Custom** mode for per-ore control
- Separate settings for **Gold Ore** and **Nether Gold Ore**
- Blue Netherite option for Ancient Debris
- In-game warning when the generated resource pack is not enabled
- Mod Menu support

## Supported Ores

Gray’s Veins currently supports:

- Coal Ore
- Iron Ore
- Copper Ore
- Gold Ore
- Nether Gold Ore
- Redstone Ore
- Emerald Ore
- Lapis Ore
- Diamond Ore
- Nether Quartz Ore
- Ancient Debris
- Gilded Blackstone

## How It Works

Gray’s Veins generates a resource pack based on your settings.

After changing settings:

1. Open Gray’s Veins settings through Mod Menu.
2. Choose **All** or **Custom** mode.
3. Adjust outlines, animation, glow, and glow strength.
4. Click **Apply Textures**.
5. Make sure **Gray’s Veins Generated** is enabled in Resource Packs.

If the generated resource pack is not enabled, Gray’s Veins will warn you in the config screen.

### Important: Enable Continuity Resource Packs

Gray’s Veins requires **Continuity** for connected textures and glow/emissive effects.

After installing Continuity, make sure Continuity’s built-in resource packs are enabled in Minecraft’s Resource Packs menu. Gray’s Veins may not show connected outlines or glow correctly unless Continuity’s resource packs are active.

## Blue Netherite

Ancient Debris has an extra **Blue Netherite** option.  
When enabled, Ancient Debris uses a blue visual style to make it much easier to spot.

Blue Netherite automatically forces glow on because the style looks best with glow enabled.

## Recommended With

Gray’s Veins works best with:

- **Fabric API**
- **Mod Menu**
- **Continuity** — required for connected textures and glow/emissive effects

Continuity is recommended if you want connected outline effects similar to connected texture resource packs.

## Credits

Texture assets used in this mod are credited to:

- **gitq** — base ore texture assets
- **ThatCuteOne** — Blue Netherite asset(s)

Gray’s Veins mod, config system, generated resource pack workflow, UI, and release packaging by **GrayscaleRGB**.

_Some texture assets are credited to their original creators. If you are an asset creator and want credit adjusted or an asset changed, please contact me._

## Notes

If glow or connected outlines are not working, check that **Continuity** is installed and its resource packs are enabled.

Glow uses the current emissive ore assets, which include framed ore pixels. Because of that, enabling Glow also keeps Outline enabled. Outlines can still be used without Glow.

This is a client-side visual mod. It does not change ore generation, loot tables, mining behavior, or server gameplay.

It is designed to make ores easier to see while still keeping the look configurable.
